Bash("$FREECAD_BIN/freecadcmd.exe" -c "
import FreeCAD
import Part
import os

# パス設定
BASE_DIR = r''D:/dev/walktalk-hub/cad-training/gearbox''
STEP_DIR = os.path.join\(BASE_DIR, ''out'', ''step''\)
OUTPUT_DIR = os.path.join\(BASE_DIR, ''out''\)

print\(''Creating assembly...''\)

# 新規ドキュメント
doc = FreeCAD.newDocument\(''gearbox_assembly''\)

# Housing
housing_path = os.path.join\(STEP_DIR, ''housing.step''\)
if os.path.exists\(housing_path\):
    Part.insert\(housing_path, doc.Name\)
    doc.Objects[-1].Label = ''Housing''
    print\(''  Added: Housing''\)

# Input Shaft
shaft_in_path = os.path.join\(STEP_DIR, ''shaft_input.step''\)
if os.path.exists\(shaft_in_path\):
    Part.insert\(shaft_in_path, doc.Name\)
    obj = doc.Objects[-1]
    obj.Label = ''Shaft_Input''
    obj.Placement = FreeCAD.Placement\(FreeCAD.Vector\(20, 19, 19\), FreeCAD.Rotation\(FreeCAD.Vector\(1,0,0\), 90\)\)
    print\(''  Added: Shaft_Input''\)

# Output Shaft
shaft_out_path = os.path.join\(STEP_DIR, ''shaft_output.step''\)
if os.path.exists\(shaft_out_path\):
    Part.insert\(shaft_out_path, doc.Name\)
    obj = doc.Objects[-1]
    obj.Label = ''Shaft_Output''
    obj.Placement = FreeCAD.Placement\(FreeCAD.Vector\(80, 19, 19\), FreeCAD.Rotation\(FreeCAD.Vector\(1,0,0\), 90\)\)
    print\(''  Added: Shaft_Output''\)

doc.recompute\(\)

# 保存
output_path = os.path.join\(OUTPUT_DIR, ''gearbox_assembly.FCStd''\)
doc.saveAs\(output_path\)
print\(f''Saved: {output_path}''\)
")

Bash("$FREECAD_BIN/freecadcmd.exe" -c "
import FreeCAD
import Part
import os

BASE_DIR = r''D:/dev/walktalk-hub/cad-training/gearbox''
OUTPUT_DIR = os.path.join\(BASE_DIR, ''out''\)

# アセンブリを開く
assembly_path = os.path.join\(OUTPUT_DIR, ''gearbox_assembly.FCStd''\)
doc = FreeCAD.openDocument\(assembly_path\)

# 全オブジェクトを結合してSTEPエクスポート
shapes = [obj.Shape for obj in doc.Objects if hasattr\(obj, ''Shape''\)]
if shapes:
    compound = Part.makeCompound\(shapes\)
    step_path = os.path.join\(OUTPUT_DIR, ''step'', ''gearbox_assembly.step''\)
    compound.exportStep\(step_path\)
    print\(f''Exported assembly STEP: {step_path}''\)

FreeCAD.closeDocument\(doc.Name\)
")
